summary: Patients with the rs75039782 CC genotype (do not have a copy of the FTR 3849+10kbC>T variant) and cystic fibrosis have an unknown response to ivacaftor or elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor treatment, as response may depend on the presence of other CFTR variants. title: CFTR / elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor
summary: Patients with the rs75039782 CT genotype (one copy of the CFTR 3849+10kbC>T variant) and cystic fibrosis may respond to ivacaftor or elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor treatment. FDA-approved drug labeling information indicate use of ivacaftor or elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor in cystic fibrosis patients with at least one copy of 3849+10kbC>T. Other genetic and clinical factors may also influence response to ivacaftor or elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor.

title: Lower vitamin B12 levels
